overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked downtown Los Angeles street during a storm. The player character walks along wet sidewalks past newspaper boxes and a bus stop, with lightning illuminating the modern glass skyscrapers in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with newspaper vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk past newspaper boxes toward the bus stop

entered.detail: covered walkway with recessed ceiling lights and stone columns
yellow newspaper vending machine on the sidewalk
red newspaper vending machine next to the yellow one
blue USPS mailbox on the wet sidewalk
tall palm trees lining the street median
illuminated downtown skyscrapers with glass facades reflecting city lights

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a rain-soaked covered sidewalk in downtown at night. The camera passes yellow and red newspaper boxes and a blue mailbox, with palm trees visible across the street and illuminated skyscrapers in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop shelter with illuminated advertisement display

events.description: approaching the illuminated bus stop shelter with glass panels
NPC pedestrian becomes visible waiting inside the bus shelter

agents.ego_description: walking past the bus stop shelter where an NPC waits, continuing through the shelter structure

notable_agents.action: standing inside the bus shelter waiting for transportation

entered.detail: modern glass and metal bus shelter with curved roof and illuminated interior
metal bench inside the shelter for waiting passengers
backlit advertisement display showing 'Visit Los Angeles' with cityscape image
AT&T retail store with illuminated white signage on dark facade
storefront with TERRACOTTA signage in white letters

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and passes through a bus stop shelter where an NPC stands waiting. The AT&T and Terracotta storefronts are visible on the right, while the camera moves past the shelter's illuminated advertisement poster and continues down the wet sidewalk.

events.description: lightning strike illuminates the sky and distant buildings with bright white flash

agents.ego_description: continuing down the wet sidewalk past the bus stop toward an open plaza area with tall buildings ahead

entered.detail: large multi-story building with glass facade and illuminated interior across the street
thick palm tree trunk on the sidewalk edge
orange construction cone on the sidewalk near the curb

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the bus stop into a more open area of the downtown street. A modern office building dominates the view across the street, and a sudden lightning strike at 45 seconds illuminates the stormy night sky and wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rain-soaked downtown sidewalk that transitions from a sheltered urban corridor into an open, storm-lashed street. It begins by gliding past yellow and red newspaper boxes and a blue mailbox, with palm trees and illuminated skyscrapers framing the distant horizon. As the camera moves forward, it passes through a bus stop shelter where an NPC waits, moving past an illuminated advertisement poster and the storefronts of AT&T and Terracotta. The scene then opens into a wider stretch of the city street dominated by a modern office building across the way. Finally, a sudden flash of lightning illuminates the stormy night sky and the reflective wet pavement, punctuating the journey through the urban rain.
